en: But when I'm fighting crime on the streets of Jersey City, I go by Ms. Marvel,
ko: 하지만 내가 저지 시티의 거리에서 범죄와 싸울 때,

en: and I hope that's okay, like, copyright-wise, because honestly, I never thought I'd ever get to meet you,
but now that it's happening, we're, like, touching each other. I've realized I should have asked permission.
ko: 너를 만날 수 있을 거라고는 생각도 못했어, 하지만 이제 그게 일어나고,

en: Name? He said it was Thor.
And your relationship to him? I've never met him before.
Until she hit him with a car. I grazed him.
But she tasered him. Yes, I did.
I think it's because I'm generally just pretty chill, you know? I'm not like, oh, my God, Hawkeye!
Definitely not chill. Hiya, champ. How was school today?
Ah, ha, ha, ha, ha. All right, get your jokes out now. Can you fix this suit?
So cranky. Got a passport? No. I don't even have a driver's license.
You ever been to Germany? No. Oh, you'll love it. I can't go to Germany.
There's a button under the handle! Press that in!
ko: 숙제가 있어요. 손잡이 아래에 버튼이 있어. 그걸 눌러

en: Okay. Now what? Open the fucking door!
